name: Amish Friendship Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. To starter batter, add remaining ingredients: chopped nuts or raisins.
2. Pour the mixture into a well-greased and sugared loaf pan(s).
3. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 55 minutes. Check after 45 minutes.
4. (Optional) Divide the baked bread into three parts and give one part to each of two friends.
STARTER BATTER:
Day 1: Mix 1/3 Cup Flour, 1/3 Cup Sugar, and 1/3 Cup Milk in a plastic container. Cover loosely. Do not refrigerate.
Day 2-4: Stir the starter batter.
Day 5: Add 1 cup each of flour, sugar, and milk. Stir.
Day 6-8: Add 1 cup each of flour, sugar, and milk. Stir. Divide the starter into three equal parts and give one part to each friend for their Day 1 bread.
